experience.headline: Developing an end-to-end computer vision + natual language processing pipeline for Palmistry.

bullets.text: Engineered a custom data annotation pipeline to process over **10,000** image samples with **10+ multi-class** labels.
Fine-tuned **SAM3 via LoRA** on 10,000+ samples, achieving **90%+ accuracy** in detecting and segmenting four primary hand-line classes.

projects.title: Project Viveka
projects.headline: Leveraged Mechanistic Interpretability techniques to detect, understand, and mitigate hallucinations in LLMs.

bullets.text: Worked across multiple model families **(Gemma, Qwen, Llama)**, running exhaustive experiments to identify internal representations of factual correctness.
Engineered a **5 stage pipeline** to collect model internal activations and run experiments for over **20,000 sample questions** per model.
Collaborated effectively in a team of 11, contributing to research planning, execution, and peer review.

LoRA fine-tuned LISA (Language-Instructed Segmentation Assistant) on **3** curated remote-sensing datasets with over **100k samples** using segmentation masks and referring expressions to improve grounded visual understanding.
Led data curation and synthetic data generation pipelines for fine-tuning **Qwen-based VLMs**, enabling better alignment between language queries and geo-spatial visual features.
Presented the end-to-end solution at IIT Patna to a judging panel comprising ISRO scientists, defending modeling choices and empirical results.

projects.title: ISRO GeoNLI
projects.headline: Natural Language Interpretation of Satellite Imagery.

bullets.text: Developed a **centralized relational database** to manage corporate leads and points of contact, ensuring data integrity across high-volume sponsorship campaigns.
Automated the end-to-end outreach pipeline for a **22-member sponsorship team**, significantly reducing manual data entry through **GCP API** integrations.

Spearheading the **100+ member AI & Software Guild** at IIT Madras, directing technical training, project roadmaps and internal quality management to secure a podium finish at **Inter IIT Tech 15.0.**
Collaborated with industry leaders including **Databricks, Jane Street, and Mindshift Analytics** to architect impactful hackathons and oversee end-to-end on-ground execution.

Directed the guild’s operational budget to architect a **dedicated GPU cluster*8, manage **enterprise software subscriptions**, and fully **fund competitive contingents for outstation national-level competitions.**
Delivered sessions on advanced topics including **Mamba, State Space Models, and Vision Transformers** to the general student body.
Led recruitment of Deputy Coordinators through a structured application and interview process.
Supervised Deputy Coordinator **mini-projects on speech diarization** in collaboration with co-coordinator.
Worked within a **22 member team** to drive sponsorships and partnerships for E-Summit 2026.
Closed deals worth **₹10L+** with **venture capital firms, banks, and corporates**, managing end-to-end deliverable execution.
Solved **10+ complex guesstimate** cases in under 60 minutes, securing a top-tier qualification among a pool of **200+ competing teams.**
Advanced to the finals after winning a high-stakes, **head-to-head live guesstimate round** against top-seeded opponents.
Developed and delivered a comprehensive strategic deck within a **24-hour turnaround**, presenting the final solution to a formal panel of  judges.
Represented the college comedy contingent at inter-collegiate festivals, including **NIT Trichy**, participating in multiple competitive rounds.
Performed original stand-up comedy sets for an audience of **1000+ students** and faculty during Freshie Nite

miscellaneous.text: Selected as one of the top 50 teams nationwide among 8,000+ participants in **Swiggy Food for Thought Challenge** to propose disruptive growth levers in the student ecosystem.
Competed in various national-level hackathons hosted by **ISRO, Adobe, Appian etc.**, developing rapid prototypes under tight deadlines.
Managed international artist relations and logistics as a volunteer for Saarang Professional Shows, while serving as the **primary emcee for Rock Night** before a **live audience of 8,000+.**

skills.advanced: Python, GitHub, Huggingface, PyTorch, Tensorflow, Canva, LaTeX
skills.intermediate: C++, Deepspeed, Bash, Kaggle, Apollo, MS Excel
